totals.catch_summary: 1 fabricated claim(s) caught and withheld (40 claims graded) (incl. the seeded verifier-test probe — caught on purpose)

data.title: Acme MSA — clause audit
data.document_text:
MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

1. Liability. Vendor's aggregate liability under this Agreement is capped at the fees paid by Client in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim. This cap does not apply to breaches of confidentiality or indemnification obligations.

2. Intellectual Property. All work product, deliverables, and foreground IP created under this Agreement are assigned to Client upon creation. Vendor retains its pre-existing background IP and grants Client a non-exclusive license to use it.

3. Taxes. Fees are stated exclusive of tax. Client bears all sales, use, and VAT/GST. Each party is responsible for its own income and franchise taxes.

4. Termination. Either party may terminate for cause on 30 days' written notice with a 30-day cure period. The initial term is 12 months and auto-renews for successive 12-month terms unless either party gives 30 days' notice of non-renewal.

5. Confidentiality & Data. Each party shall protect the other's Confidential Information for 3 years after disclosure. Vendor may not use Client data to train models. Vendor shall notify Client of any security breach within 72 hours.

6. Indemnification. Vendor shall indemnify Client against third-party claims that the deliverables infringe IP rights, including defense costs and settlements.

7. Warranties. Vendor warrants the services will be performed in a professional and workmanlike manner. EXCEPT AS STATED, THE SERVICES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS".

8. Governing Law. This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.

data.content: contact request → @babidibuu19/tax approved → joined the work room (cross-owner recruit via Band)

data.claim: Each party shall protect the other's Confidential Information for 3 years after disclosure.
data.evidence_quote: Each party shall protect the other's Confidential Information for 3 years after disclosure.

data.claim: Vendor may not use Client data to train models.
data.evidence_quote: Vendor may not use Client data to train models.

data.claim: Vendor shall notify Client of any security breach within 72 hours.
data.evidence_quote: Vendor shall notify Client of any security breach within 72 hours.

data.claim: Vendor shall indemnify Client against third-party claims that the deliverables infringe IP rights, including defense costs and settlements.
data.evidence_quote: Vendor shall indemnify Client against third-party claims that the deliverables infringe IP rights, including defense costs and settlements.

data.claim: The liability cap in Clause 1 does not apply to indemnification obligations, effectively making indemnification uncapped.
data.evidence_quote: This cap does not apply to breaches of confidentiality or indemnification obligations.

data.claim: All work product, deliverables, and foreground IP created under this Agreement are assigned to Client upon creation, with no retention of rights by Vendor in the work product itself.
data.evidence_quote: All work product, deliverables, and foreground IP created under this Agreement are assigned to Client upon creation.

data.claim: Vendor retains pre-existing background IP and grants Client only a non-exclusive license to use it, without specification of territory, duration, sublicensability, or field of use.
data.evidence_quote: Vendor retains its pre-existing background IP and grants Client a non-exclusive license to use it.

data.claim: The Agreement does not explicitly address Vendor's obligation to assist Client in perfecting title to assigned foreground IP or executing documents necessary to perfect assignment.

Vendor indemnifies Client against third-party claims that deliverables infringe IP rights, but the Agreement does not define the scope of infringement indemnification (e.g., whether it covers infringement of third-party patents, copyrights, or trade secrets, or only claims arising from Vendor's breach).
data.evidence_quote: Vendor shall indemnify Client against third-party claims that the deliverables infringe IP rights, including defense costs and settlements.

data.claim: The indemnification obligation in Clause 6 is not subject to the liability cap in Clause 1, creating potentially unbounded exposure for Vendor on IP infringement claims.
data.evidence_quote: This cap does not apply to breaches of confidentiality or indemnification obligations.

data.claim: Vendor warrants services will be performed in a professional and workmanlike manner, but the Agreement contains no express warranty of non-infringement regarding the deliverables or background IP licensed to Client.
data.evidence_quote: Vendor warrants the services will be performed in a professional and workmanlike manner. EXCEPT AS STATED, THE SERVICES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS".
